zh.Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, England: 英國爾哈頓 在 瓦維頓
zh.lifeSummary: Emma de Daresbury於大約1039年出生在英國爾哈頓 在 瓦維頓。她於1062年與Wolfric de Hatton在英國爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1100年享年63歲。

zh-hans.Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, England: 英国爾哈頓 在 瓦維頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Emma de Daresbury于大约1039年出生在英国爾哈頓 在 瓦維頓。她于1062年与Wolfric de Hatton在英国爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1100年享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: Emma de Daresbury was born about 1039, in Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, England. She married Wolfric de Hatton in 1062, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. She died about 1100, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Emma de Daresbury est née environ 1039, à Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Wolfric de Hatton en 1062, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1100, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Emma de Daresbury wurde um 1039 in Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, England geboren. Sie hat 1062 in Cheshire, England Wolfric de Hatton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Sie starb um 1100 im Alter von 63 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Emma de Daresbury è nata il circa 1039 nel Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, England. Lei sposato Wolfric de Hatton nel 1062, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì circa 1100, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Daresburyは約1039年にイギリスチェシュアイアハットオン イン ワバートンで生まれた。1062年にイギリスチェシュアイアでWolfric de Hattonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1100年に63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Daresbury(은)는 대략 1039년 영국 체실르 해턴 인 와버턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1062년 영국 체실르에서 Wolfric de Hatton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1100년 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1039–about 1100: tany ho any amin'ny 1039–tany ho any amin'ny 1100

pt.lifeSummary: Emma de Daresbury nasceu aproximadamente 1039, em Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Wolfric de Hatton em 1062, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1100, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Emma de Daresbury родилась около 1039 г. в местности хаттон ин вавиртон, чешир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wolfric de Hatton в 1062 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Она умерла около 1100 г. в возрасте 63 лет.

sm.about 1039–about 1100: e tusa o le 1039–e tusa o le 1100

es.lifeSummary: Emma de Daresbury nació aproximadamente 1039, en Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Wolfric de Hatton en 1062, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1100, a la edad de 63 años.
